title: To Hide the Flag on the Phone number

posts.author: bernadette (Robert and Bernadette Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
Continuing the discussion from [U.S. Phone Number showing different country flag](https://community.monday.com/t/u-s-phone-number-showing-different-country-flag/22

Click on the header ‘Phone’ and go to settings. Click ‘Hide’ Flag.
